locations.name: Noosa National Park, Granite Bay, Noosa, Queensland, Australia

details.description: A coastal walking path skirts a rocky shoreline on a clear, sunny day. The track is a narrow, compacted-dirt trail cut into a vegetated hillside with coastal scrub and pandanus. Below the path is a pebbly/rocky beach with rounded dark stones and exposed rock platforms where small waves wash in. The headland curves ahead, covered in dense green bushland. Several hikers with daypacks are walking east along the track. Lighting suggests afternoon sun from the right, casting warm highlights on the rocks and vegetation. The scene matches the seaside section of Noosa Headland’s Coastal Walk within Noosa National Park, likely around Granite Bay/Tea Tree Bay where the shoreline is notably rocky.

details.description: A coastal hiking scene along a cliffside Noosa National Park trail. The image shows a narrow dirt path winding along a rocky shoreline to the left with waves lapping a pebble beach. The right side features a slope densely covered with low scrub and small trees. The sky is a bright, clear blue with a few wispy clouds. Three hikers walk away from the camera along the trail, each carrying backpacks; one backpack is purple, the others dark. Sunlight creates distinct shadows on the ground. This setting resembles a Noosa National Park coastal track near Noosa Heads, Queensland, Australia.

details.description: A scenic coastal landscape captured on a bright, sunny day along a hiking trail. In the foreground, three individuals are walking away from the camera on a dirt path; the person on the left wears a purple Osprey backpack, and the person on the right wears a black Champion backpack. To the left of the trail, the coastline features a distinctive beach composed of large, dark, rounded granite rocks and pebbles rather than sand, with white-capped waves rolling in from the blue ocean. To the right, a steep hill is densely covered in green coastal forest and scrub vegetation. In the distance, a forested headland extends into the sea under a clear blue sky with wispy clouds.

details.description: A vertical outdoor photograph captures three hikers walking along a dirt trail on a coastal headland. The trail, part of a scenic coastal walk, overlooks a rocky bay with white-capped waves rolling onto a shore of dark pebbles and stones. To the right of the trail, a steep hillside is covered in dense green coastal vegetation and forest. In the distance, another forested headland curves into the sea. The sky is a deep, clear blue with a few wispy white clouds. The lighting is warm and directional, suggesting late afternoon sun, casting long shadows from the hikers and the rugged terrain. Notable vegetation includes Pandanus trees with their characteristic prop roots and sword-like leaves scattered along the cliffside.

Low coastal scrub and pandanus-like plants line the track, typical of subtropical Australian coastal vegetation. The setting strongly resembles the Noosa National Park Coastal Track overlooking Granite Bay at Noosa Heads, Queensland.

details.description: A coastal hiking scene on a narrow dirt track that contours a vegetated headland above a rocky, cobble-stone bay. Three day-hikers with backpacks walk along the trail. Below are granite-like rock shelves and rounded pebbles with small surf washing in. The hillside is covered in coastal scrub with pandanus-like trees and succulents. A rounded forested headland and cove extend ahead. Clear blue sky and late-afternoon sunlight create long shadows. The setting strongly resembles the Coastal Walk on Noosa Headland, with the pebbly bays typical of Granite Bay/Tea Tree Bay in Noosa National Park, Queensland, Australia.

details.description: A coastal hiking trail runs along a rocky shoreline with a pebbled beach. In the foreground, a small group of hikers with backpacks walk along a dirt path that hugs the edge of the coast. The hillside to the right is covered in dense green scrub and small trees, sloping up from the shore. The sea to the left shows gentle waves washing over dark rocks and pebbles. The sky is bright blue with a few wispy clouds, and warm sunlight casts defined shadows on the path.

details.description: A sunny, outdoor shot taken from a slightly elevated dirt hiking trail looking forward along a coastline. In the foreground, three hikers walk away from the camera; the woman on the left wears a purple Osprey backpack, dark shorts, and a dark t-shirt, while the woman on the right wears a black Champion backpack. To the left, the ocean features white-capped waves crashing onto a distinctive beach composed of large grey rounded stones and pebbles rather than sand. To the right, a steep hill rises, densely covered in coastal vegetation, including identifiable Pandanus trees with spiky leaves. The sky is a vibrant deep blue with wispy white clouds. In the distance, the coastline curves around a headland.

details.description: A group of three hikers is walking along a sandy coastal trail on a bright, sunny day. The trail winds along a cliffside, offering a view of a rocky shoreline and a bay with white-capped waves. The landscape features steep hills covered in dense green forest and coastal scrub, with several prominent pandanus trees (screw pines) visible along the path. The sky is a clear, deep blue with a few wispy clouds, and the late afternoon sun casts long shadows across the trail.

Three people with backpacks walk along a narrow dirt trail cut into a vegetated headland above a rocky shoreline with rounded cobbles and dark rock outcrops.
